title: Bound Extended Side Angle Yoga Pose 1stx 1:30

transcript.text: Hello, I am Kyle Pounds, and this is Bound Side-Angled Twist.
If I do a minute, I'm good. If I do a minute on my first try, I'm good.
Gotta do the other side. It's like godliness.
Is that how it's done? I'm gonna do this though.
Holy snap, it's fucking harder on the other side. I don't know why. This isn't good.
I'm fucking barely holding over here. I can if I rest it like this, but if I go up like this, I'm just, I can't do it.
If I can with you, no problem. What's wrong? If you hold it like this, I'll improve the form if someone tells me to.
